hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE "git[[:space:]]+commit|gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create" && jq -n --arg m "Impactful change? If this commit/PR adds a feature or changes behavior/API, verify the user-facing docs reflect it before finalizing: README.md, README.fr.md (keep FR in sync with EN), doc.go (package godoc), and claude-skill/SKILL.md. Skip trivial commits (chore/refactor/test-only/docs)." "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",additionalContext:\$m}}" || true

cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE "git[[:space:]]+tag|gh[[:space:]]+release[[:space:]]+create" && jq -n --arg m "Release detected. If you are tagging/releasing r8e or a side package (otter/ristretto/r8eotel), evaluate whether policy-skills/ needs an update per policy-skills/MAINTENANCE.md: diff the public API, update the affected references, bump policy-skills/VERSIONS.json and the r8e-policy SKILL 'Pinned r8e version', re-run the calibration, then re-tag policy-skills/vX.Y.Z." "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",additionalContext:\$m}}" || true
